headline: Chartis acquires Leap AI to expand transformation capabilities
summary: Chartis acquired Leap AI to expand its AI transformation capabilities for clients. The acquisition adds AI expertise and tools to Chartis's consulting portfolio, enabling them to offer more comprehensive AI implementation services.
so_what: While Chartis isn't a top-tier consulting competitor, this acquisition shows smaller firms are aggressively building AI capabilities through M&A. It demonstrates the broader market trend toward AI-focused consulting services.
original_title: Chartis Acquires Leap AI To Expand AI Transformation Capabilities - Pulse 2.0
